title: Irv_Newhouse
raw_text:
Irving Ralph Newhouse (October 16, 1920 – March 29, 2001) was an American farmer and politician in the state of Washington. He served in the Washington House of Representatives from 1965 to 1980 and in the Senate from 1980 to 1999. He was the father of Dan Newhouse, who is currently the U.S. representative for Washington's 4th congressional district.
